Title: Hidden Inventory: Part 3
Actors: Reba Buhr, Gakuto Kajiwara, Takehito Koyasu
Plot: Gojo, Geto and Amanai rescue Kuroi. They then set off together to the island of Okinawa. However, back in Tokyo, the group is ambushed by somebody with only one goal - to prevent the fusion of Riko Amanai and Tengen.
